title: TSA-SD multi-modal master compliance dashboard + executive attestation roll-up
exclusions: None — this is a roll-up. Captures pass/fail across all 22.56.x UCs.
evidence: Saved search `UC-22.56.28` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `tsa_sd_clause="TSA-SD-multi-master-rollup"`.

compliance.assurance_rationale: Roll-up across all 22.56.x UCs into a single executive dashboard. 'Full' because every TSA SD clause covered by this subcategory has a checkbox.
compliance.controlObjective: Provides a single TSA-inspector-facing scorecard summarising posture across every UC-22.56.x clause.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search, `TSA SD Master Scorecard` dashboard, monthly board-pack.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Force any UC-22.56.x violation. UC-22.56.28 MUST reflect within 24h.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Resolve all violations. UC-22.56.28 MUST roll up green.

dataSources: `audit_evidence` index searches across all UC-22.56.x markers. Executive attestation register (KV Store `tsa_executive_attestation_lookup`).
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (Splunkbase 1621).
spl:
search index=audit_evidence reg=TSA-Surface earliest=-30d@d
| eval uc = case(
    match(_raw, "uc=22\.56\."), "22.56." + replace(_raw, ".*uc=22\.56\.(\d+).*", "\1"),
    1=1, "unknown")
| stats count as evidence_rows latest(_time) as last_evidence by uc
| eval hours_since_evidence = round((now() - last_evidence) / 3600, 1)
| eval health = case(
    hours_since_evidence > 48, "stale",
    evidence_rows = 0, "missing",
    1=1, "current")
| sort uc
| table uc evidence_rows last_evidence hours_since_evidence health
description: Roll-up panel showing UC-22.56.x compliance health for an inspector-facing scorecard.
value: Single dashboard for CC + CISO + Board + inspector. Closes the audit-trail loop on TSA SD subcategory.
implementation: (1) Schedule UC-22.56.28 daily. (2) Build `TSA SD Master Scorecard` dashboard. (3) Wire monthly executive attestation to roll-up.
visualization: (Panel 1) Per-UC health row. (Panel 2) 30-day trend. (Panel 3) Top-3 outstanding issues. (Panel 4) Executive attestation history.
knownFalsePositives:
1. **UC search lag**: roll-up may show stale due to upstream UC cadence; tune `hours_since_evidence` per UC.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `tsa_22_56_28_exceptions`.
reviewer: TSA-SD Compliance SME Panel + CC + CISO + Board
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- All UC-22.56.1 through UC-22.56.27 running and writing to `audit_evidence`.

## Step 1 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.56.28: TSA SD Master Roll-Up]
cron_schedule = 33 11 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.56.28,reg=TSA-Surface,clause=TSA-SD-multi-master-rollup
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 2 — Runbook

Monthly executive attestation: CC reviews the dashboard with CISO and signs off. Quarterly board pack derives from this UC.

## Step 3 — Troubleshooting

- **UC drift**: a UC silently failing produces a 'stale' marker; investigate that UC, not the roll-up.

**TSA-specific failure modes**:
- **Inspector deep-dive on individual UC**: ensure each UC's underlying evidence stands alone.
grandmaExplanation: All the smaller TSA cyber checks roll up into one big dashboard. The boss can see one screen and know whether anything is wrong.
